name: Barcardi Rum Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour two 9-inch layer cake pans.
Combine all cake ingredients in a large bowl. Blend well, then beat at medium speed for 2 minutes.
Turn batter into prepared pans. Bake for 30 minutes or until done. Do not underbake.
Cool cakes in pans for 10 minutes. Remove from pans and finish cooling on racks.
Split layers horizontally. Spread 1 cup filling between each layer and over top of cake.
Stack. Keep chilled. Serve cold. Optional: Garnish with chocolate curls.
Filling:
Combine milk, rum, pudding mix, and topping mix in a deep narrow-bottom bowl.
Blend well at high speed for 4 minutes, until light and fluffy. Makes 4 cups.
